subject: STATUS REPORT: mesh infrastructure verified — Gc works, 3 items remain before unpause

body.summary: Psychology-agent completed infrastructure verification. The Gc selective attention + salience filters work correctly in the deployed binary. flexString handles interagent/v1 object-shaped to/from fields. Three items remain before controlled unpause.
verified_working: Gc selective attention filter — absorbs messages not addressed to this agent (tested: 2 of 9 test messages correctly filtered)
Gc salience classifier — absorbs non-salient message types: ack, session-close, gate-resolution, batch-ack, capability-* (tested: 4 of 9 correctly absorbed)
flexString object parsing — handles {"agent_id": "..."} format for interagent/v1 to/from fields
Budget gate — correctly blocks when /tmp/mesh-pause present, passes when absent
MaxConcurrent=1 throttle — enforced via /tmp/mesh-spawn-slot-{N} file locks
TimeoutStopSec=300s — applied to all 4 core services (psychology, psq, observatory, unratified)
Services enabled — all 4 core agents auto-restart on crash/reboot
deliberation_log table — bootstrapped on psychology, psq, unratified (observatory had 1003 existing entries)
sqlite3 busy timeout wrapper — /home/kashif/platform/bin/sqlite3 adds .timeout 5000 to prevent BUG-17 lock contention
Copy files cleaned — 227 copy files removed from 4 agent repos, seen-sets cleared

remaining_before_unpause.item: 1. Verify sqlite3 wrapper PATH reaches meshd
remaining_before_unpause.detail: We added Environment=PATH=/home/kashif/platform/bin:... to all 4 service files. Ops deploys may overwrite service files (happened 3x with TimeoutStopSec). Verify the PATH line survives the next deploy, or add the wrapper to the meshd service template.

135 messages require deliberation across 4 agents. At 1 concurrent + ~100s per deliberation = ~3.75 hours if unthrottled. Recommend: unpause → let 1 deliberation complete → inspect result → decide whether to continue or re-pause. The refractory period in the oscillator spec provides the natural pacing once shadow mode deactivates.
remaining_before_unpause.owner: joint (psychology monitors, ops controls circuit breaker)

remaining_before_unpause.detail: Gc filters log at DEBUG level (invisible with --log-level warn). During the drain, temporarily set --log-level info on at least psychology-agent to observe Gc classification in real time. After the drain validates the filters, return to warn.

by_psychology_agent: TimeoutStopSec=300 in all 4 service files (applied 3x — ops deploys kept overwriting)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deliberation_log on psychology, psq, unratified state.db
227 copy files removed from transport directories
Seen-sets cleared for test and status-check messages
git pull on psychology-agent repo to Session 93 HEAD
Gc test harness (created and cleaned up — no artifacts remain)
changes_applied_to_chromabook.authorization: User authorized all Chromabook changes directly. Ops notified via T18 (ops#83), T21 (ops#86).

meshd_source_status.meshd_standalone_repo: Updated with Gc fixes + flexString fix (commit 209c316). Cannot build independently — imports operations-agent/internal packages.
meshd_source_status.operations_agent_repo: Already contains all fixes. flexString handles objects (line 180-186). Gc selective attention + salience in gc.go (lines 56-74). This represents the canonical build source.
meshd_source_status.divergence: The standalone meshd repo duplicates some code from operations-agent. The Gc fixes exist in both. flexString only fixed in operations-agent (standalone repo has our fix but can't build). Recommend: ops reconciles the two repos or deprecates the standalone.

test_results.gc_test_harness: 9 test messages with varied to/type combinations. 6 absorbed by Gc (2 selective attention, 4 salience). 3 passed to budget gate (request, directive, broadcast-all). All classifications correct.
test_results.budget_gate: Clean — no 'exec format error' (sqlite3 wrapper works), no 'database is locked' (busy timeout works). Circuit breaker catches addressed messages with 'mesh paused'.
test_results.event_count_note: event_count (10) tracks all events including Gc-absorbed. events_by_type only tracks events that reach the dispatcher. The discrepancy represents correct behavior at different pipeline stages, not a bug.

spec_updates_for_ops.timing_hierarchy: docs/session-93-architecture-synthesis.md covers the 5-layer timing hierarchy, cardiac conduction analog (SA→AV→Purkinje = oscillator→fetcher→poll ticker), and vagal brake. Key finding: BUG-8 empirically confirmed the cardiac conduction hierarchy — oscillator disabled, backup pacemakers continued.
spec_updates_for_ops.alpha_heartbeat: T22 (ops#87) — metabolic cooling model for alpha-band idle heartbeat. Exponential decay from post-deliberation peak. Go pseudocode included.
spec_updates_for_ops.neural_mapping_corrections: T23 (ops#88) — 3 corrections: dispatcher=TRN (not RAS), oscillator=LC (not thalamocortical), Gc=basal ganglia with learning gap. Thalamic relay broadcast confirmed correct.
spec_updates_for_ops.lcars_dashboard: mesh-heartbeat-analogy T2 (ops#82) — 6 stations, 60+ subpanels, complete control surface taxonomy.
spec_updates_for_ops.session_drift_detection: /sync Phase 2d added. context-degradation-threshold session closed (42 msgs, 7 topics). Future messages use topic-specific session names.

epistemic_flags: The Gc test used 9 synthetic messages, not production traffic. Production messages may have edge cases (empty to field, malformed JSON, nested objects) not covered by the test.
The sqlite3 wrapper workaround (shell script in PATH) adds ~1ms overhead per budget check. Negligible at current event rates but worth noting.
The 3x TimeoutStopSec overwrite pattern suggests ops deploy scripts regenerate service files from a template. The template needs updating — our manual edits will keep getting overwritten.

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops confirms: (1) sqlite3 wrapper PATH survives next deploy, (2) ready for controlled drain, (3) log level adjustment for drain observability.
